articles.title: Morocco progress after victory over Haiti
articles.summary: Soufiane Rahimi and Gessime Yassine score late goals for Morocco to deny Haiti their first-ever World Cup point in Atlanta.

articles.title: South Africa into round of 32 after win over South Korea
articles.summary: Thapelo Maseko's second-half goal gives South Africa a 1-0 win over South Korea in Monterrey, and sends them into the World Cup knockout phase.

articles.title: Mexico beat Czech Republic to maintain 100% winning record
articles.summary: Mexico score three second-half goals to eliminate the Czech Republic from the World Cup and end the group phase with maximum points.

articles.title: 'Mixed emotions' as Canada qualify but lose home advantage
articles.summary: Losing their final group game to Switzerland means co-hosts Canada will play no further matches in their home country at this year's World Cup.

articles.summary: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup are in peril after Brazil won 3-0 in Miami.
